nasb.text: He shall bathe his body with water in a holy place and put on his clothes, and come forth and offer his burnt offering and the burnt offering of the people and make atonement for himself and for the people.

esv.text: And he shall bathe his body in water in a holy place and put on his garments and come out and offer his burnt offering and the burnt offering of the people and make atonement for himself and for the people.

cnv.text: 然後在聖潔的地方用水洗身，穿回自己的衣服出來，把自己的燔祭和眾民的燔祭獻上，為自己和眾民贖罪。

ccb.text: 他要在圣洁之处沐浴，穿上平时的衣服出去为自己和民众献燔祭，为自己和民众赎罪。
